src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Mo.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.general_idea: Add handling for `URISyntaxException` thrown by the new `URI` constructor to ensure the code compiles and runs correctly.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add @Column annotations to explicitly map fields to database columns, likely to avoid reserved keyword conflicts (e.g., 'key', 'value') in newer H2 versions.
